|epname=Kangaskhan...Kangascan't
|desc=Vivillon debuted in ''[[PS554|Kangaskhan...Kangascan't]]''. It was first seen with its Trainer in [[Santalune City]]. [[PS555|Later]], it faced {{adv|X}}'s [[Kanga]] in the [[Santalune Gym]], where it lost. In ''[[PS592|Zygarde Agitated]]'', Vivillon helped Viola, [[Yvette]], and the {{tc|Sky Trainer}}s free the captive Pokémon at {{rt|10|Kalos}}, by working together with the Sky Trainers' Vivillon.

Vivillon has a Meadow Pattern.

Vivillon's known moves are {{m|Supersonic}} and {{m|Powder}}.}}

{{anchor|Surskit 2}}{{TrainerPoké

|desc={{p|Surskit}} is Viola's second known Pokémon. It was first used to prevent [[Celosia]] from escaping with a stolen [[Kangaskhanite]] with its Sticky Web. Later, Surskit was defeated by Celosia's {{p|Honedge}}.

Surskit's only known move is {{m|Sticky Web}}.}}
